sqlMap.select: select ud.UserNo as reviewerId, ud.AgentName as reviewerName from userdetails ud inner join SubproducerUserdetails subd on ud.UserNo=subd.UserNo where subd.ProducerCode=#ProducerCode# and ud.EligibleFirstReviewer='Y' order by ud.AgentName
select UserNo as reviewerId, AgentName as reviewerName from UserDetails where EligibleFirstReviewer='Y' and UserNo not in(select UserNo from SubproducerUserdetails) order by AgentName
select UserNo as reviewerId, AgentName as reviewerName from UserDetails where EligibleFirstReviewer='Y' order by AgentName
select AgentEmail, AgentState, PassWord, UserNo, AgentName, LicenseNumber from UserDetails where UserNo = #UserNo#
sqlMap.update:
update UserDetails set
AgentEmail = #AgentEmail# AgentEmail = null AgentState = #AgentState# AgentState = null PassWord = #PassWord# PassWord = null AgentName = #AgentName# AgentName = null LicenseNumber = #LicenseNumber# LicenseNumber = null
where UserNo = #UserNo#
sqlMap.select: select AgentEmail, AgentState, PassWord, UserNo, AgentName, LicenseNumber from UserDetails where UserNo = #UserNo#
select UserNo, AgentEmail, AgentState, PassWord, AgentName, LicenseNumber from UserDetails

select AgentEmail,AgentState,PassWord,UserNo,AgentName,LicenseNumber,IsActiveAgent,EligibleFirstReviewer,AliasEmail,ZohoUserID,IsActiveZohoUser from UserDetails where IsActiveAgent='Y' order by AgentName
